_comment: ADR-015 iter50 — per-cell hf2q/llama tok/s ratio floors.  iter50 LANDS the gemma forward_mlx Leg F → Branch A route at force_dense_sdpa_on_tq_kv default (forward_mlx.rs:2293,2315).  Gemma decode shifts from 8 dispatches/layer (Leg F: 2 dequant + 2 cache_copy + 2 FWHT + 2 flash_attn_vec) to 4 dispatches/layer (Branch A: 2 cache_copy + 2 flash_attn_vec) on already-allocated dense_kvs, closing the −2.48pp residual after iter49 into a +1.43pp lead vs llama.  Sister cells (apex, 27b, dwq46) on qwen35 forward_gpu path are unaffected by this change and confirmed within thermal noise vs iter45-RESUMED.
_recapture_reason: iter50 paired bench: gemma 5 trials × 3 sides {A_baseline=f1d11a4, B_iter50, L_llama-bench} + 3 sister fixtures × 3 trials × iter50 binary.  Bench: /tmp/iter50/bench/20260429T220742Z.results.tsv.
_methodology: scripts/iter45-chain-n-curve-bench.sh at NGEN=256, prompt='Hello, my name is', N_TRIALS=5 cold-process per cell.  hf2q runs each fixture under each of HF2Q_PARTIAL_CHAIN_N ∈ {1,2,4,8,20}; ratios below are hf2q_med / llama_med at the production-default cn for that fixture's quant arm.  Floor = measured_ratio - 0.01 tolerance.  Phase 5 gate: ≥1pp improvement on primary fixture AND ≥0pp regression on every other fixture AND coherence_smoke 12/12 PASS post-change.

qwen3.6-35b-a3b-dwq46._note: MoE-35B-A3B × dwq46 (Q4_0 expert blocks per iter47).  iter45-RESUMED N-curve: cn=1 → 0.9439× (40 layer CBs/tok); cn=2 → 1.0114× (20 layer CBs/tok); cn=4 → 1.0060×; cn=8 → 0.9963×; cn=20 → 0.9705×.  iter45 LANDS (MoeQ, Q4_0) → cn=2 in chain_n_for; Phase 5 gate +6.75pp PASS.  Floor 1.00 = measured 1.0114 - 0.01 tolerance.

qwen3.6-35b-a3b-dwq48._note: MoE-35B-A3B × dwq48 (Q4_0 + Q8 sensitive).  Not in iter45-RESUMED N-curve fixture set; same Q4_0 MoE arm fix applies (cn=2).  Floor inherited from dwq46 (same Q4_0 MoE catch-all bypass).  Re-measure when fixture is added to coherence_smoke.

qwen3.6-35b-a3b-apex._note: MoE-35B-A3B × apex (Q5_K MoE).  iter45-RESUMED N-curve: cn=1 → 1.0481× (production default; matches iter43's 1.0629× within thermal noise); cn=2 → 1.0628×; cn=4 → 1.0579×; cn=8 → 1.0500×; cn=20 → 1.0285×.  cn=2 +1.47pp gain measured but Phase 5 ≥1pp gate is on PRIMARY fixture only — apex is sister to dwq46 (Q4_0 arm); Q5_K cn shift deferred to a separate iter (validate apex Q5_K + Q6_K together against full N-curve; iter50+ candidate).  Floor 1.04 = measured 1.0481 - 0.01 tolerance.

qwen3.6-27b-dwq46._note: dense-27B × dwq46 (Q4_0 dense per iter47, falls through chain_n_for `_ => 1` catch-all).  iter45-RESUMED N-curve: cn=1 → 1.0330× (production default); cn=2 → 1.0365×; cn=4 → 1.0400×; cn=8 → 1.0400×; cn=20 → 1.0365×.  cn=4/8 measured optimum (+0.70pp vs cn=1) — fails Phase 5 gate ≥1pp; (DenseQ, Q4_0) arm DEFERRED.  Floor 1.02 = measured 1.0330 - 0.01 tolerance.

qwen3.6-27b-dwq48._note: dense-27B × dwq48.  Not in iter45-RESUMED N-curve fixture set.  Floor inherited from iter41.

gemma-26B-dwq._note: gemma-26B × dwq.  iter50 LANDS Leg F → Branch A route default at forward_mlx.rs:2293,2315.  Iter43→iter49 was 0.9629→0.9752 (+1.23pp from iter49 HB-encode gate).  iter50 measures Side A baseline=102.8 (0.9754×, replicates iter45-RESUMED) and Side B iter50=106.9 (1.0143×) vs same-day llama-bench median 105.39.  Δ B vs A = +3.89pp.  Phase 5 winner-gate PASS: ≥1pp on primary AND sister fixtures within thermal noise of iter45-RESUMED archived (dwq46 114.0-114.4 vs 113.9; apex 107.0-107.1 vs 106.8; 27b-dwq46 29.8-29.9 vs 29.7).  Floor 1.00 = measured 1.0143 - 0.01 tolerance, gating regressions to ≥1.00× minimum.

_tolerance_explanation: A cell fails if its measured ratio drops >1 percentage point (0.01 absolute) below its ratio_floor. Tolerance accommodates same-day thermal noise (~5% intra-trial spread on M5 Max single-process per project_m5max_residency_null_win_single_process) without admitting a real regression.

_iter45_resumed_n_curve_summary._pre_flight_audit: PASS — pmset clean, vm_stat 104 GB free, FCP/davinci/handbrake/ffmpeg empty, biomesyncd absent, mcp-brain-server STOP/CONT trapped

h1_cn_20_wins_dwq46.evidence: dwq46 cn=20 = 0.9705× (−4.09pp vs cn=2 winner; −0.27pp vs cn=1 baseline).  cn=20 collapses below cn=8 on dwq46.  Per-CB driver-overhead amortization at 3-CB/token regime is overshadowed by Metal async-overlap loss (iter25 mechanism still operative on coherent baseline).

h2_cn_2_local_optimum.evidence: dwq46 cn=2 = 1.0114× (+6.75pp vs cn=1, +1.14pp vs llama).  apex cn=2 = 1.0628× (+1.47pp vs cn=1).  27b cn=2 = 1.0365× (+0.35pp vs cn=1).  cn=2 wins or ties on every fixture with the chain_n lever active.  Iter17/26 finding TRANSFERS to coherent baseline — the iter40+iter42 coherence fixes did not invalidate the cn=2 optimum.

h3_cn_1_universally_fastest.evidence: cn=1 is the WORST non-pathological setting on both MoE fixtures: dwq46 cn=1 = 0.9439× (−6.75pp vs cn=2); apex cn=1 = 1.0481× (−1.47pp vs cn=2).  Only retained as catch-all for arm/cfg mismatches.

dense_q4_0_arm_at_cn_4.verdict: DEFERRED — fails Phase 5 ≥1pp gate (only +0.70pp gain).  Re-evaluate after dwq48 fixture added to N-curve.

apex_q5k_arm_at_cn_2.verdict: DEFERRED — primary measure passed +1.47pp but apex is the SISTER fixture in iter45-RESUMED (not the primary); needs an apex-primary iter to validate Q5_K + Q6_K shifts together.  iter50+ candidate.

_iter50_summary._pre_flight_audit: PASS — pmset clean, vm_stat 100+ GB pre-bench, FCP/davinci/handbrake/ffmpeg empty, biomesyncd absent, mcp-brain-server STOP/CONT trapped

h2_phase_5_winner_gate.candidate: Branch A route at force_dense_sdpa_on_tq_kv default — forward_mlx.rs:2293,2315 (None if force_dense_sdpa_on_tq_kv => true)
h2_phase_5_winner_gate.verdict: LANDED — primary +3.89pp exceeds Phase 5 ≥1pp gate AND ≥0pp on every other fixture AND coherence_smoke 12/12 + coherence_matrix 0 GIBBERISH
